assertions.assertion: Uses ClaimMappings dictionary on SamlServiceProvider for per-SP attribute mapping
assertions.rationale: ClaimMappings on SamlServiceProvider is Duende-specific and not general knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Explains or shows AllowedScopes as a prerequisite for claims reaching ClaimMappings
assertions.rationale: The claim pipeline (AllowedScopes→ClaimMappings) is Duende-specific architecture.

assertions.assertion: Shows how to set DefaultClaimMappings on SamlOptions for global defaults
The mapping correctly associates OIDC claim names (keys) to SAML attribute URIs (values)
assertions.rationale: Without knowing the Duende model, a general LLM cannot show the correct mapping direction.
